_comment: Cost-correct stable-ingress descent (pd-TF-LB stable_ip). A single-instance service fronted only for a fixed public IP (Cloudflare origin) should NOT pay for a digitalocean_loadbalancer that never balances. With load-balancer.StableIP=true the DO render degenerates to a free digitalocean_reserved_ip bound to the target droplet. This is the on-contract expression that supersedes hand-written digitalocean_reserved_ip HCL. Render with: go run ./cmd/pyxenv-render -in examples/load-balancer-stable-ip/topology.json -out examples/load-balancer-stable-ip/rendered
Name: edge
